title: Shafin da aka raba
loading: Ana loda shafin da aka raba
unavailable: Wannan shafin da aka raba baya samuwa.
notFound: Ba a sami shafin da aka raba ba.
outsideShare: Shafin baya cikin wannan rabon jama'a.

errors.not-found: Wannan hanyar haɗin yanar gizo na iya ƙarewa, an soke bugawa, ko an kwafe ta kuskure.
errors.offline: Bincika haɗin yanar gizonku, sannan sake buɗe shafin da aka raba.
errors.rate-limited: Wannan shafin da aka raba yana karɓar buƙatu da yawa. Jira ɗan lokaci sannan a sake gwadawa.
errors.unavailable: Hanji ba zai iya buɗe wannan shafin da aka raba a yanzu ba. A sake gwadawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
